free speech: Free speech is alive and well here! Everyone's welcome to share their thoughts 🗽
rules: Check the #rules channel to see what's expected around here.
mods: The mod team keeps things fair — DM a mod if you ever need help!
ban: Bans are only handed out for serious rule violations. Keep it chill and you'll be fine 👍
invite: Use the invite link pinned in #general to bring your friends in!
nitro: Nitro boosters get access to exclusive perks — check #perks for the full list!
ping: Don't ping people without a good reason. Use #bot-commands for bot stuff.
drama: Take personal drama to DMs. Keep the server vibes positive 🙏
